name: Story Arc Board
description: A menu-bar board for capturing repeated hooks from notes, captions, and comments before they disappear into app sprawl.
short_description: A menu-bar board for capturing repeated hooks from notes, captions, and comments before they disappear into app sprawl.
default_prompt: Use $story-arc-board to build a polished macOS menu-bar utility that captures recurring hooks from notes, captions, and comments without forcing extra tab switching.
detail_lines: Pulls recurring phrases, symbols, and post ideas into one compact Mac surface.
Cuts the tab-hopping between Notes, social drafts, and comment threads when shaping the next beat.
Keeps the board lightweight so it feels like a real menu-bar relay instead of a full social dashboard.
